response.justification: Strong fullstack profile with 13+ years of experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure including MCP frameworks, which maps cleanly onto the role's stack and AI agent requirement. Demonstrated craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), React experience at Optilyz, and broad polyglot background including Java. Berlin-based, matching likely location needs. Minor gaps around Nest.js and Kotlin specifically, but the foundation is solid enough to ramp quickly.
strengths: Direct AI agent/MCP experience at current role aligns with a key requirement
Deep TypeScript/Node.js + React fullstack background across multiple senior roles
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, workshops, and open-source leadership
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is older (robotics/LabWindows era)
Cloud experience skews AWS/CDK only; no explicit GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth beyond GISCollective deployment

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin experience
